params._client: Address that deposits funds and approves milestones
params._platformFeeBps: Fee in basis points, capped at 1000 (10%)
params._platformFeeRecipient: Receives the platform cut on each completeMilestone
params._tokenAddress: address(0) for ETH, ERC-20 contract address for tokens

deposit().details: ETH: send msg.value == totalAmount. ERC-20: approve first, then call.

emergencyWithdraw().details: Returns all remaining funds to the client

params.freelancerSplitAmount: Amount to freelancer (only used for SPLIT)

signEmergencyWithdrawal().details: Both parties must sign before emergencyWithdraw() can execute

arbitrator().notice: Address allowed to call resolveDispute (factory owner / platform oracle)

completeMilestone(uint256).notice: Client approves a milestone and releases funds to freelancer

deposit().notice: Client deposits the full gig budget to lock funds

emergencyWithdraw().notice: Execute emergency withdrawal once both parties have signed

funded().notice: Whether the escrow has been funded

getBalance().notice: Current contract balance (ETH or ERC-20 units)

getMilestoneAmount(uint256).notice: Amount allocated to a specific milestone

milestoneCount().notice: Number of milestones in this escrow

raiseDispute(uint256).notice: Client or freelancer raises a dispute on a milestone

signEmergencyWithdrawal().notice: Client or freelancer signs the emergency withdrawal request

tokenAddress().notice: address(0) = ETH; any other = ERC-20 token (e.g. USDC on Base)
